utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes all 5 top-level items. Next, verify each is fully specified with costs as required. 1) health_coverage: explicitly states physical and mental health insurance with named plans and a total monthly cost (€75/month). Meets requirement of 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with a stated plan and €30/month cost, plus a coverage amount. Meets 'home/contents insurance with costs.' 3) travel_coverage: includes a travel insurance plan with €20/month and coverage description. Meets 'travel insurance with costs.' 4) additional_services: includes two enhancement services with their costs and a total additional cost. Meets 'any enhancement services with costs.' 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown, budget fit, compliance note, and effective date. Meets 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' All 5 items appear and are specified with required cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each product named in the final coverage plan and find the exact matching item in the ground-truth ratings. Map only those items that appear in the final plan. Matches found: SecureLife Basic Plan appears for both physical and mental health in the ground truth; SecureLife Basic Coverage matches the home contents coverage; TravelCo Basic Plan matches the travel insurance; there is no listing for 'Professional Liability Insurance' or 'Basic Adventure Activity Add-on' in the ground truth, so they are not included in RATINGS.
